buySharesRange(uint256,uint256,uint256,u.details: User pays once, receives shares that cover ALL buckets in range.      If ANY bucket in range wins, user gets full payout.

params.targetShares: FE-provided quote hint (0 = binary search, >0 = try fast path first)

returns.shares: Number of shares received (covers ALL buckets in range)

returns.payoutUSDC: Amount of USDC received ($1 per share)

params.sharesToClaim: Number of shares to claim (in WAD 18 decimals)

configureAlphaDecay(uint256,uint256,uint.details: Once configured, alpha decays linearly from alphaInitial to alphaFinal over decayDuration      with sync checkpoints every ALPHA_EPOCH_LENGTH.      Callable by the market creator OR the factory (atomically at creation time).

params._alphaFinal: Alpha floor (6 decimals), must be < alphaInitial and >= 10% of alphaInitial

configureExpansion(uint256,uint256).details: Remaps existing bucket indices, rebuilds tree with expanded capacity.      Inactive buckets have tree leaf = 0 (no LMSR weight) until activated.

params.expandedMax: New maximum value (must be ≥ current marketMax, aligned to bucketWidth)
params.expandedMin: New minimum value (must be ≤ current marketMin, aligned to bucketWidth)

emergencyPause().details: Only callable by the factory contract (controlled by owner/multisig)

emergencyUnpause().details: Only callable by the factory contract

returns.roi: Return on investment in basis points

getSafetyBuffer().details: As alpha decays, the worst-case future loss shrinks proportionally.      Capital reserved for a now-impossible high-alpha path is released as surplus.      For non-decay markets alpha == alphaInitial so behavior is identical.

refreshMaxLiability().details: Useful before harvesting surplus — ensures reserves aren't over-locked

resolveMarket(uint256).details: Takes a resolution value in the market's value space (e.g., $115,000) and      calculates which bucket contains that value. Matches Sui's resolve_market_with_outcome.

params.sharesToSell: Number of shares to sell (must have this many in ALL buckets)

params._maxRangeWidth: Max buckets per range trade (0 = no limit)

syncAlpha().details: Recalculates cached exp terms when entering a new epoch

withdrawLP().details: Callable by the market creator OR the registered lpVault.      When called by lpVault the funds flow back to the vault (not to creator) so      the multi-vault can recycle capital across markets.

activeBucketCount().notice: Number of buckets with active LMSR weight (≤ bucketCount when expansion configured)

buySharesRange(uint256,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Buy shares across a contiguous range of outcomes (Correlated LMSR)

claimRange(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Claim winnings if your range contains the winning bucket

claimWinnings(uint256,uint256).notice: Claim winnings for a resolved market (winning shares pay $1 each)

configureAlphaDecay(uint256,uint256,uint.notice: Configure epoch-based alpha decay for sniper defense

configureExpansion(uint256,uint256).notice: Configure dynamic range expansion — factory-only, one-time, before any trades

currentMaxBucketId().notice: Index of the bucket currently holding the most shares

emergencyPause().notice: Emergency pause — blocks all trading, claims, and LP operations

emergencyUnpause().notice: Unpause an emergency-paused market, returning it to ACTIVE

getQuoteForRange(uint256,uint256,uint256.notice: Get quote for buying shares across a range

getSafetyBuffer().notice: Safety buffer based on CURRENT alpha (not initial).

initialBucketOffset().notice: Number of expansion buckets below the original range (bucket ID offset)

initialize(uint256,address,address,addre.notice: Initialize market state. Called by the constructor on direct deployment,         and by MarketFactory after Clones.clone() on the EIP-1167 proxy path.         Can only be invoked once per contract instance (_initialized guard).

lpFeesAccrued().notice: Cumulative LP fees that stayed in the contract (accounting transparency)

maxBucketCount().notice: Total bucket capacity including expansion room (0 = no expansion)

maxRangeWidth().notice: Maximum buckets allowed in a single range trade (0 = no limit)

protocolFeeCollector().notice: Configurable protocol fee recipient (replaces hardcoded constant)

refreshMaxLiability().notice: Permissionless refresh of maxLiability to current actual maximum

resolveMarket(uint256).notice: Resolve market with winning outcome value (Sui parity)

sellShares(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Preview gross return for selling range shares (view — no state change)

sellSharesRange(uint256,uint256,uint256,.notice: Sell shares from a range position (Correlated LMSR)

setMaxRangeWidth(uint256).notice: Set max range width (factory-only, called post-initialize)

syncAlpha().notice: Permissionless alpha sync endpoint for keepers

withdrawLP().notice: Withdraw LP funds after market resolution
